ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word or phrase */,
  "vernacular_name" TEXT /* Vernacular name of the word or phrase */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the word or phrase */,
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the locality of the word or phrase */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the word or phrase */,
  "lexicon" TEXT /* Type of lexicon (e.g., English (Creole)) */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who submitted the word or phrase */,
  "created" TEXT /* Date and time the word or phrase was submitted */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech (e.g., noun, verb, adjective) */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the word or phrase */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage in a sentence */,
  "cultural_context" TEXT /* Cultural context or significance */,
  "is_idiom" INTEGER /* Flag if the word/phrase is an idiom */,
  "is_colloquial" INTEGER /* Flag if the word/phrase is colloquial */,
  "dialect" TEXT /* Dialect, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_locality_id FOREIGN KEY ("locality_id") REFERENCES localities ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en, es, fr) */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Language family (e.g., Indo-European) */,
  "spoken_in" TEXT /* Countries where the language is spoken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "localities" (
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each locality */,
  "locality_name" TEXT /* Name of the locality */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Code for the country (e.g., US, CA, MX) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country (e.g., Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the locality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("locality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the contributor */,
  "contributions_count" INTEGER /* Number of contributions by the contributor */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word or phrase being reviewed */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who submitted the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the word or phrase (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Actual content of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word or phrase associated with the tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_localities" (
  "word_locality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word-locality relationship */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word */,
  "locality_id" INTEGER /* ID of the locality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_localities_locality_id FOREIGN KEY ("locality_id") REFERENCES localities ("locality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_localities_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)
